sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this NES game

special_mechanics.name: Boat Flight via Ramps
special_mechanics.description: Speedboat can go airborne by launching off ramps during gameplay

special_mechanics.name: Water Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Isometric perspective boat control with automatic screen scrolling; navigation around obstacles, logs, and whirlpools

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay description and design credits but no specific physics parameters, sub-pixel data, or numerical movement values. Game is a vehicular combat racer, not a character platformer, making traditional jump/gravity metrics inapplicable.
